description: Phenomenology of early universe, cosmic microwave background, cosmological parameters.
Interplanetary medium, planetary physics, planetary astrobiology, extrasolar planets.
Phenomena pertaining to galaxies or the Milky Way. Star clusters, HII regions and planetary nebulae.
Cosmic ray production, acceleration, propagation, detection. Gamma ray astronomy and bursts.

White dwarfs, brown dwarfs, cataclysmic variables. Star formation and protostellar systems.
Glasses and spin glasses; properties of random, aperiodic and quasiperiodic systems.
Semiconducting nanostructures: quantum dots, wires, and wells. Single electronics, spintronics.
Techniques, synthesis, characterization, structure. Structural phase transitions, mechanical properties.

Quantum magnetism, non-Fermi liquids, spin liquids, quantum criticality.
Superconductivity: theory, models, experiment. Superflow in helium.
